case_title: MARCOS REYES VS. TREBOL TOURS AND TRAVEL

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED - SERVED AUG-20-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TREBOL TOURS AND TRAVEL

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-05-2018 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE TO NOV-02-2018 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF MARCOS REYES IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY HIS DAUGHTER A NON COURT CERTIFIED INTERPRETER. INTERPRETER WAS SWORN IN BY DEPUTY COURT CLERK R. SAHATJIAN. DEFENDANT TREBOL TOURS AND TRAVEL IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRO TEM JUDGE: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT TREBOL TOURS AND TRAVEL HEARING SET FOR JAN-18-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (1 CERTIFIED COPY) PAID BY PLAINTIFF REYES, MARCOS
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF REYES, MARCOS AS TO DEFENDANT TREBOL TOURS AND TRAVEL
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-02-2018 - JUDGMENT.
ORDER MOTION TO VACATE: DENIED. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: COPY OF FILED NOTICE OF MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 12/21/18. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - ATTEMPTED - NOT KNOWN - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
STIPULATION TO JUDGE PRO TEM SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY REYES, MARCOS

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY ON JAN-18-2019 - DENIED. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF MARCOS REYES ASSISTED BY NON CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER BLANCA REYES. DEFENDANT TREBOL TOURS AND TRAVEL DID NOT APPEAR. THE NON-CERTIFIED INTERPRETER WAS GIVEN THE INTERPRETER'S OATH BY COURTROOM CLERK: R.SAHATJIAN. PLAINTIFF STIPULATES TO A JUDGE PRO TEM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF REYES, MARCOS AS TO DEFENDANT TREBOL TOURS AND TRAVEL
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $320.24 ACCRUED INTEREST, $50.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO PLAINTIFF REYES, MARCOS
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE ON COURT'S OWN MOTION (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS).

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-02-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-02-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF MARCOS REYES ASSISTED BY NON-COURT CERTIFIED INTERPRETER BLANCA REYES. THE NON-COURT INTERPRETER WAS GIVEN THE INTERPRETER'S OATH BY COURT CLERK R. SAHATJIAN. DEFENDANT TREBOL TOURS AND TRAVEL DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF REYES, MARCOS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TREBOL TOURS AND TRAVEL $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,590.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY REYES, MARCOS AS TO DEFENDANT TREBOL TOURS AND TRAVEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-05-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY REYES, MARCOS
